name: EchoForge
description_short: Identity and proof layer on Cardano. Anchor certificates and file hashes on-chain for a flat $1 in ADA, with a tiered wallet identity layer (EchoID) in development.
description_long: EchoForge is a B2B2C identity and proof layer on Cardano, built around one principle: keep it simple. Its live products let anyone prove things on-chain for a flat $1 in ADA. EchoCert anchors certificates and credentials so they can be independently verified on-chain. EchoUploader anchors a file's SHA-256 hash as a permanent proof of existence; the file itself never leaves the user's device. EchoID, a wallet-based identity and tiering layer, is in development. All USD prices settle in ADA via an on-chain oracle (Charli3, with CoinGecko fallback).

products.name: EchoCert
products.description: Anchors certificates and credentials on Cardano for independent on-chain verification. $1 per certificate in ADA.

products.name: EchoUploader
products.description: Creates a permanent on-chain proof of existence for any file by anchoring its SHA-256 hash. $1 per anchor in ADA; the file never leaves the user's device.

products.name: EchoID
products.description: Wallet-based identity and tiering layer for the EchoForge ecosystem. In development.

policy.description: Minting policy for EchoCert on-chain certificate anchoring. Each token name equals SHA-256(name | date | issuer). $1 ADA per issuance.

scripts.description: EchoCert minting validator (Plutus v3, Aiken v1.1.21). Issues and revokes on-chain credential certificates as Cardano native tokens.
DocuMint minting validator — early-stage EchoCert predecessor for document hash anchoring. Superseded by echocert.
